teams.name: Everyone
teams.description: General AIUX Lab announcements sent to all users

teams.name: Design Systems
teams.description: Figma, design import, and UX kit updates

teams.name: Widget Developers
teams.description: Widget build, karuna, and component guidance

teams.name: ServiceNow Admins
teams.description: Instance connection, SDK, and deploy configuration

notifications.title: AIUX Lab 1.8.0 is here
notifications.body: This release bundles the Figma extraction MCP servers into the DMG, fixes mermaid rendering in packaged builds, and adds the E2E automation suite. Review what changed before you continue.

notifications.title: Node 24+ and pnpm 10+ required
notifications.body:
AIUX Lab needs Node.js >= 24.14.1 and pnpm >= 10. Older versions break the build and widget compile.

Click **Fix automatically** to install the required versions in the terminal.

actions.label: Fix automatically
actions.command: nvm install 24 >/dev/null 2>&1; corepack enable 2>/dev/null; npm install -g pnpm@10 && node -v && pnpm -v

notifications.title: Pin @servicenow/karuna@^0.3.0
notifications.body:
New apps must use the karuna meta-package at ^0.3.0. 5.x and fragmented aiux-* deps break the build.

Click **Install karuna** to add it to the current project.

notifications.title: Widgets with a server script need @server()
notifications.body: Add @server('./server-script.js') to widgets that have a server-script.js, or the build emits no XML ("Missing widget XMLs"). This is a manual code fix.

notifications.title: Required toolchain is missing or outdated
notifications.body:
AIUX Lab detected that Node.js, pnpm, or git is missing or below the required version. Widget builds and the ServiceNow SDK will not work until this is fixed.

Click **Fix automatically** to install pnpm 10 and the correct Node in the terminal.

actions.label: Fix automatically
actions.command: nvm install 24 >/dev/null 2>&1; corepack enable 2>/dev/null; npm install -g pnpm@10 && node -v && pnpm -v && git --version

notifications.title: ServiceNow SDK path not configured
notifications.body:
The Karuna / ServiceNow SDK is not available. Widget deploys and instance sync will fail.

Click **Install SDK** to install it globally via npm.

notifications.title: AIUX CLI is not linked
notifications.body:
The aiux CLI is not globally linked, so terminal commands and some automations won't be available.

Click **Link CLI** to install it globally.

notifications.title: A newer AIUX Lab build is available
notifications.body: You're running an outdated build. Update to the latest DMG to get the newest fixes and avoid config drift.

notifications.title: Update AIUX Lab to the latest version
notifications.body: Your AIUX Lab build is behind the latest published version. Update to stay on the supported release and avoid config drift.

notifications.title: Figma token not configured
notifications.body: No Figma token is set. Design import and Figma extraction won't work until you add one in Settings → Integrations.

notifications.title: Figma token expired or revoked
notifications.body: Your Figma token was rejected by Figma (expired, revoked, or missing read scope). Replace it in Settings → Integrations to restore design import.
